channel.title: The AI Sales Leader: Insights
channel.description: Straight answers on sales leadership, revenue growth, and AI-powered sales teams, from Greg Grand.

item.title: Salesforce AI Training Alternatives for Live Instruction
item.description: Beyond generic software tutorials, discover effective Salesforce AI training alternatives that offer live instruction focused on your specific sales process.

item.title: Executive Sales Mastermind Group for AI Leaders: The Forum
item.description: Join an executive sales mastermind group for AI. Gain frameworks, peer insights, and direct strategies to lead your sales team through the AI revolution. Stop guessing, start leading.

item.title: How to Modernize a Sales Team with AI: A CRO's Guide
item.description: A battle-tested CRO's guide on how to modernize a sales team with AI. Focus on process first, not tools, to genuinely transform your revenue engine.

item.title: CASL: The Definitive AI Sales Leadership Certification
item.description: Learn why an AI sales leadership certification like CASL is critical for today's sales leaders. Build real systems, not just tools. Master process, people, and pipeline with AI for growth that expands.

item.title: How to Roll Out AI to a Sales Team: System First, Tools Second
item.description: Learn how to roll out AI to a sales team successfully. Greg Grand explains why process standardization must precede AI tools for real revenue gains.

item.title: How to Use AI to Prepare for a Discovery Call in 15 Minutes
item.description: Master how to use AI to prepare for a discovery call. Learn Greg Grand's method for gathering key intel in minutes, crafting targeted questions, and stopping wasted sales calls.

item.title: How to Use AI for Sales Prospecting Research: Smarter Hunting
item.description: Discover how to use AI for sales prospecting research effectively. Learn Greg Grand's systems to move beyond basic data gathering and find high-intent buyers.
